title: Multistate cases
doc_html:
BOOK IV. CONFLICT OF LAWS

TITLE I. GENERAL PROVISIONS

Art. 3514. Multistate cases

            Unless otherwise expressly provided by the law of this state, cases having contacts with other states are governed by the law selected in accordance with the provisions of this Book.

            Acts 2025, No. 488, §1.

with other states are governed by the law selected in accordance with the provisions of this
Book.
